summary: AIShield India web application with Google Analytics and Search Console integration
architectural_notes: Google Analytics integration for visitor tracking and analytics
Google Search Console integration for search performance monitoring
Access control configured for Analytics dashboard and Search Console permissions

existing_features.title: Install Google Analytics tracking code in the frontend application with proper initialization in the main entry point or root layout component
Add Google Search Console verification meta tag to frontend/index.html to enable console access

Create documentation file with instructions for granting Google Analytics dashboard access and Google Search Console permissions to the project owner, including steps to obtain and securely share admin credentials

new_feature_requests.summary: Install Google Analytics with dashboard access
Add Google Search Console with permissions
